Class StaffServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
shelter.service.impl.StaffServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
StaffService
public class StaffServiceImpl extends Object implements StaffService
Default implementation of StaffService that loads a staff profile from a CSV file. In the current demo, a single hardcoded admin staff member is used; this service reads the operator's name and role from a one-line CSV file at the given path.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description
    StaffServiceImpl()
    Constructs a StaffServiceImpl with no dependencies.

  • Constructor Details

    • StaffServiceImpl

      public StaffServiceImpl()
      Constructs a StaffServiceImpl with no dependencies. Staff data is read directly from the file system on demand.

  • Method Details

    • loadCurrentStaff

      public Staff loadCurrentStaff(String filePath)
      Reads a staff profile from the given file path and returns the corresponding Staff object. Throws an exception if the file cannot be read or the profile data is invalid. Reads the first data line of the CSV file at filePath and constructs a Staff object. Expected CSV format: name,role. Throws an exception if the file cannot be read or does not contain at least one data line after the header.
      Specified by:
      loadCurrentStaff in interface StaffService
      Parameters:
      filePath - the path to the staff profile CSV file
      Returns:
      the Staff object representing the current operator
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if filePath is null or blank
      RuntimeException - if the file cannot be read or is malformed

    • listAll

      public List<Staff> listAll()
      Returns all staff members registered in the system. Returns an empty list if no staff are registered. Returns an empty list since staff are not persisted to a repository in the current demo. The single active staff member is loaded on demand via loadCurrentStaff(String).
      Specified by:
      listAll in interface StaffService
      Returns:
      a list of all staff members

    • findByRole

      public List<Staff> findByRole(String role)
      Returns all staff members with the given role. Returns an empty list if no staff with that role exist. Returns an empty list since staff role queries are not supported in the current demo.
      Specified by:
      findByRole in interface StaffService
      Parameters:
      role - the role to filter by (e.g. "Veterinarian", "Coordinator")
      Returns:
      a list of staff members with the specified role
